title: Topic 1: Vague Communication
description: The struggle of being too generic in professional messaging and how to write with absolute clarity.

title: Topic 2: Automation Myths
description: Why people think automation takes hours of setup when simple triggers can save 5 hours a week.

title: Topic 3: Continuous Learning
description: The mistake of waiting until you feel 'ready' to start learning a new skill instead of learning through small daily practice.
